steps.title: Identify the grammatical position
steps.content:
The subject a team of researchers (singular) is followed by a blank, then the infinitive phrase to find connections.

The sentence later contains analyzed as the main verb.

This structure calls for a modifier of the subject, not an independent verb clause that would compete with analyzed for main-verb status.

steps.title: Match the participle form
steps.content:
The participle hoping creates a modifying phrase that describes the researchers' purpose while leaving analyzed as the clear main action.

Finite verb forms like was hoping or hoped would create an awkward independent clause structure.

Only the non-finite participle properly functions as a modifier describing the subject.

This matches choice D — D is correct.
